name: Hellish Kiss
descrip: Deeply kiss your opponent. Can charm them.
outcome: [AttackerName] roughly and lovingly makes out with [TargetName], aggressively entangling tongues while letting out melty hot gasps, her seductive gaze staring into [TargetHisOrHer] all the while, and she occasionally nibbles on [TargetHisOrHer] lips.
miss: [AttackerName] roughly and lovingly makes out with [TargetName], but [TargetName] manages to endure the intense kiss!
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s mind is left in a foggy haze of desire from [AttackerName]'s passionate kiss! [TargetName] is charmed!
